# seedAppLimitDefaults

<!-- @constructive-io/graphql-codegen - DO NOT EDIT -->

React Query mutation hook for seedAppLimitDefaults

## Usage

```typescript
const { mutate } = useSeedAppLimitDefaultsMutation(); mutate({ input: { defaults: '<JSON>' } });
```

## Examples

### Use useSeedAppLimitDefaultsMutation

```typescript
const { mutate, isLoading } = useSeedAppLimitDefaultsMutation();
mutate({ input: { defaults: '<JSON>' } });
```
